introSection: Superman el Último Escape is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster was originally intended to be a 2002 attraction. Construction started that year, but was halted due to a dispute between Six Flags and the Mexican government. It took about two years to resolve these issues and construction resumed in 2004 with the roller coaster opening on 19 November 2004.

fullText:
Superman el Último Escape is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico.

The coaster was originally intended to be a 2002 attraction. Construction started that year, but was halted due to a dispute between Six Flags and the Mexican government. It took about two years to resolve these issues and construction resumed in 2004 with the roller coaster opening on 19 November 2004.
